message: - Courtney!? What are you doing here?
Oh, come on, I'm a resident of NY too! I shouldn’t be judged for where I walk.
There's no point in staying here.
This is the back entrance of Guy's apartment.
it's pretty unusual for her to be here.
What is she doing in a place like this? It's already suspicious that she’s near Guy's apartment.
I can't get a read on what this woman is thinking. I can't let my guard down.
We run into each other a lot today. Are we destined for this?
I don't think that's the case.
That’s a cold way to put it. I think you could afford to be a bit kinder.
Right! I want to ask why you did that earlier.
It felt like I was being interviewed.
That’s just because I wanted to know more about you.
Are you here for the interview with Guy?
What did you talk about with Guy?
Just so you know, I'm not interested in Guy anymore. I'm interested in you.
Can you tell me what you discussed with Guy?
First of all, Guy is away on a trip, so there's no way we could talk.
Huh!? He went on a trip?
Oh my, you didn't even know that? Is that what male bonding is like?
I wonder who he went with.
It’s definitely not me, that's for sure.
Well, I have to go now. Let's chat more next time.
